title: Thailand Budget Discovery
description: Experience the magic of Thailand on a shoestring with this well-planned budget itinerary. From Bangkok's glittering temples and chaotic markets to the turquoise waters of Krabi's coastline, this trip packs in iconic sights at minimal cost. Ideal for solo travellers and gap-year adventurers who want to see Thailand authentically.
inclusions: 4 nights in budget guesthouses and hostels (twin/dorm sharing, clean and central)
Daily breakfast at the guesthouse
Bangkok city tuk-tuk tour covering major temples
Krabi 4 Islands shared snorkelling speedboat trip with lunch
All airport and inter-city transfers by shared minivan or public ferry
exclusions: Thai visa on arrival fee (approx. ₹2,500 for Indians)
Personal expenses, optional activities, and tips

days.title: Arrival in Bangkok – Temple Trail
days.image: Bangkok Wat Pho reclining Buddha gold temple tourists afternoon
activities: Arrive at Suvarnabhumi Airport; shared transfer to guesthouse near Khao San Road
Afternoon: Visit Wat Pho (Reclining Buddha) and Wat Arun (Temple of Dawn) across the Chao Phraya River
Evening: Explore Khao San Road – street food, Chang beer, and lively traveller atmosphere

days.title: Bangkok – Grand Palace & Chatuchak Market
days.image: Bangkok Grand Palace Emerald Buddha golden spires blue sky tourists
activities: Morning: Visit the Grand Palace complex and Wat Phra Kaew (Temple of the Emerald Buddha) – arrive early to beat the heat
Afternoon: Explore Chatuchak Weekend Market (if Saturday/Sunday) or MBK shopping mall
Evening: Take the Chao Phraya Express Boat to the waterfront area; dinner at a riverside hawker stall

days.title: Bangkok to Krabi – Beach Town Arrival
days.image: Krabi Ao Nang Beach longtail boats karst cliffs turquoise water evening
activities: Morning: Fly Bangkok to Krabi Airport (1.5 hours); shared minivan to Ao Nang Beach
Afternoon: Check in and relax on Ao Nang Beach; rent a kayak for an hour along the cliffs
Evening: Enjoy a cheap seafood BBQ dinner at the Ao Nang beachfront night market

days.title: Krabi – 4 Islands Snorkelling Tour
days.image: Krabi 4 Islands coral reef snorkelling crystal clear water longtail boat
activities: 8 AM: Join shared speedboat for the 4 Islands tour – visit Koh Mook, Koh Kradan, Koh Libong, and Tham Morakot (Emerald Cave)
Midday: Snorkelling at coral gardens; boxed lunch on the beach at Koh Kradan
Evening: Return to Ao Nang; walk to Nopparat Thara Beach for a free sunset; dinner at Tiger Beer Garden

days.title: Railay Beach & Departure
days.image: Krabi Railay Beach dramatic limestone cliffs white sand longtail arrival
activities: Morning: Short longtail boat ride to Railay Beach (25 min); walk to Phra Nang Cave and its beach
Midday: Swim and relax at Railay West beach – arguably one of Thailand's most beautiful beaches
Afternoon: Return to Ao Nang; transfer to Krabi Airport for departure flight

title: Thailand Family Fun Holiday
description: Thailand is one of Southeast Asia's most family-friendly destinations, and this itinerary brings the best of it together. Kids will love the ethical elephant sanctuary in Chiang Mai, the water parks and beaches of Phuket, and cooking classes that turn them into little Thai chefs. Safe, comfortable, and endlessly fun for the whole family.
inclusions: 5 nights in 3-4 star family rooms (2 adults + 2 children, connecting rooms where needed)
Daily breakfast and 2 family dinners
Chiang Mai ethical elephant sanctuary half-day visit with mud bath and feeding
Phuket island tour by speedboat (Phi Phi Islands) with life jackets for children
Private air-conditioned vehicle and family guide throughout
exclusions: Thai visa on arrival fees for the family
Lunches except on island tours; personal spending money

days.title: Arrival in Bangkok – Family Orientation
days.image: Bangkok Asiatique riverside night market family fun Ferris wheel river
activities: Arrive at Suvarnabhumi Airport; private transfer to family hotel in the Sukhumvit area
Afternoon: Visit the SEA LIFE Bangkok Ocean World at Siam Paragon – kids' favourite with shark tunnels and penguin shows
Evening: Family dinner cruise on the Chao Phraya River with live cultural performance

days.title: Bangkok – Temples & Safari World
days.image: Bangkok Safari World kids feeding giraffes open zoo Thailand
activities: Morning: Visit Grand Palace and Wat Pho with a family guide who makes history interesting for kids
Afternoon: Safari World Bangkok – open zoo and marine park with dolphin and sea lion shows
Evening: Family dinner at a Thai restaurant on Silom Road with a traditional Muay Thai show

days.title: Fly to Chiang Mai – Elephant Sanctuary
days.image: Chiang Mai ethical elephant sanctuary family bathing mud river jungle
activities: Morning flight Bangkok to Chiang Mai (1 hour); check in to family resort
Afternoon: Half-day visit to an ethical elephant sanctuary – feed, bathe, and walk with rescued elephants; mud bath fun
Evening: Chiang Mai Night Bazaar for handicraft shopping and street food tasting with children

days.title: Chiang Mai – Doi Inthanon & Cultural Crafts
days.image: Doi Inthanon National Park twin royal pagodas mist family Thailand
activities: Morning: Drive to Doi Inthanon National Park – visit the stunning twin royal chedis and a hilltribe village
Midday: Picnic lunch at the park; nature walk to Wachirathan Waterfall (kids love the spray)
Afternoon: Return to Chiang Mai; kids' Thai cooking class at a cooking school (make Pad Thai and mango sticky rice)

days.title: Fly to Phuket – Beach Day
days.image: Phuket Patong Beach family umbrella chairs blue sky calm sea
activities: Morning flight Chiang Mai to Phuket; check in to beachfront family resort at Karon Beach
Afternoon: Relax on Karon Beach – swimming, sandcastles, and banana boat rides for the kids
Evening: Phuket FantaSea cultural theme park – spectacular carnival and a Thai buffet dinner with elephant show

days.title: Phi Phi Island Speedboat Tour & Departure
days.image: Phi Phi Island Maya Bay turquoise lagoon speedboat family snorkelling
activities: 8 AM: Family speedboat tour to Phi Phi Islands – snorkel at Loh Samah Bay, visit Maya Bay, and Viking Cave
Midday: Beach barbecue lunch on Phi Phi Don Island
Afternoon: Return to Phuket; transfer to Phuket International Airport for departure flight

title: Thailand Romantic Paradise
description: Thailand has long been Asia's honeymoon capital, and this romantic getaway proves why. Begin with candlelit dinners in Bangkok's rooftop bars, drift to the paradise island of Koh Samui for overwater villa luxury, and end at Krabi's dramatic Railay Beach for sunsets that belong in a film. Every moment is designed for just the two of you.
inclusions: 5 nights in romantic boutique hotels and beachfront resorts (couple rooms with décor on arrival)
Daily breakfast in bed (at resort properties) and 3 romantic dinners
Koh Samui private longtail boat sunset cruise with champagne for couples
Couples' Thai traditional massage (2 hours) at a luxury spa
All private air-conditioned transfers and domestic flights
exclusions: Personal spa add-ons beyond what's included; personal shopping

days.title: Arrival in Bangkok – Rooftop Romance
days.image: Bangkok Lebua Sky Bar rooftop couple skyline champagne sunset golden
activities: Arrive at Suvarnabhumi Airport; private transfer to a 5-star hotel in the Silom/Riverside area
Afternoon: Cruise the Chao Phraya River on a rice barge – visit Wat Arun and the old French Embassy quarter
Evening: Champagne cocktails at Lebua Sky Bar (the Hangover Bar); romantic dinner at Sirocco restaurant with city views

days.title: Bangkok – Culture & Canal Charm
days.image: Bangkok canal klong boat orchid market floating market couple morning
activities: Morning: Private long-tail boat through Bangkok's klongs (canals) – visit Wat Arun and Taling Chan Floating Market
Afternoon: Explore the Grand Palace and Wat Pho; couples' foot massage in the Old Town
Evening: Romantic dinner at a riverside terrace restaurant; take a metered tuk-tuk back to the hotel

days.title: Fly to Koh Samui – Island Arrival
days.image: Koh Samui Chaweng Beach turquoise water white sand palm trees couple
activities: Morning flight Bangkok to Koh Samui; check in to a beachfront pool villa resort at Chaweng Noi
Afternoon: Lounge on the private beach; couples' snorkelling at Coral Cove Beach
Sunset: Private longtail sunset cruise around Koh Samui's coastline with champagne and canapés

days.title: Koh Samui – Ang Thong Marine Park & Spa
days.image: Ang Thong Marine Park emerald lake viewpoint couple Thailand island paradise
activities: Morning: Speedboat to Ang Thong Marine National Park – kayak through the famous Emerald Lake and snorkel in gin-clear water
Afternoon: Return to Koh Samui; 2-hour couples' traditional Thai oil massage at a luxury hilltop spa
Evening: Private beach dinner set-up with candles, flowers, and a Thai set menu under the stars

days.title: Fly to Krabi – Railay Beach Bliss
days.image: Krabi Railay Beach dramatic limestone cliffs sunset couple silhouette
activities: Morning flight Koh Samui to Krabi; longtail boat to Railay Beach (car-free, accessible only by sea)
Afternoon: Check in to a cliff-top resort; explore Phra Nang Cave Beach – one of Thailand's most beautiful
Evening: Sundowner cocktails overlooking the bay; seafood dinner on the beach

days.title: Railay – Rock Climbing & Departure
days.image: Krabi Railay West Beach morning calm water limestone cliffs reflection couple
activities: Morning: Optional couples' beginner rock climbing on Railay's famous limestone walls with a guide
Late morning: Last swim at Railay East beach; longtail back to Ao Nang
Afternoon: Transfer to Krabi Airport for departure flight; treasure the last views of the Andaman coast

title: Thailand Thrill Seeker Circuit
description: Thailand is a playground for adventure lovers. This action-packed itinerary takes you jungle trekking to waterfalls in Kanchanaburi, white-water rafting and rock climbing in Chiang Mai, diving with whale sharks in Koh Tao, and cliff-jumping off Krabi's limestone towers. No two days are the same on this adrenaline-fuelled circuit.
inclusions: 5 nights accommodation in adventure hostels and eco-lodges
Daily breakfast and packed lunches on trekking/diving days
Kanchanaburi bamboo rafting and jungle trek with guide
Koh Tao Open Water PADI discover scuba diving (1 day intro dive)
Chiang Mai white-water rafting on the Mae Taeng River (grade 3-4 rapids)
exclusions: Personal diving/adventure equipment beyond what's provided
Travel insurance (mandatory for adventure activities – strongly recommended)

days.title: Arrival in Bangkok – Muay Thai Clinic
days.image: Bangkok Muay Thai training gym fighter shadow boxing ring evening
activities: Arrive at Bangkok; private transfer to hostel in the Banglamphu area
Afternoon: 2-hour introductory Muay Thai boxing class at a Bangkok training camp
Evening: Explore Khao San Road and Rambuttri Village; watch a live Muay Thai match at Lumpinee Stadium (check schedule)

days.title: Kanchanaburi – River Kwai & Jungle Trekking
days.image: Kanchanaburi River Kwai bamboo raft jungle green reflection Thailand
activities: 7 AM: Minivan to Kanchanaburi (2.5 hours); visit the infamous Death Railway Bridge over River Kwai
Midday: Bamboo rafting down the Kwai Noi River; jungle trek to Erawan Waterfall (7 tiers of turquoise pools)
Evening: Return to Bangkok; recovery dinner and stretch at the hostel

days.title: Fly to Chiang Mai – White-Water Rafting
days.image: Chiang Mai Mae Taeng River white water rafting rapid jungle adventure
activities: Morning flight to Chiang Mai; check in to trekking hostel
Afternoon: White-water rafting on Mae Taeng River (grade 3-4 rapids, about 2 hours); followed by a zip-line canopy tour in the jungle
Evening: Night Bazaar dinner and gear prep for trekking the following day

days.title: Chiang Mai – Doi Inthanon Trek & Rock Climbing
days.image: Chiang Mai Doi Inthanon summit trekker forest mist Thailand mountain
activities: 7 AM: Summit hike of Doi Inthanon (Thailand's highest peak at 2,565m); misty forest trail with birdwatching
Midday: Packed lunch at the summit near the royal twin pagodas
Afternoon: Introductory rock climbing session at the Crazy Horse Buttress limestone crags near the city

days.title: Fly to Koh Tao – Scuba Diving
days.image: Koh Tao coral reef scuba diver tropical fish clear water Thailand
activities: Morning: Fly Bangkok to Koh Samui; ferry to Koh Tao (2 hours); check in to dive hostel
Afternoon: Discover Scuba Diving introduction session in the bay – snorkel warm-up then dive to 6m
Evening: Beach bonfire at Sairee Beach; meet fellow divers and plan next day's dive

days.title: Koh Tao – Snorkel & Departure
days.image: Koh Tao Shark Bay snorkelling blacktip reef sharks shallow water clear
activities: Morning: Snorkelling at Shark Bay (spot blacktip reef sharks in shallow water) and Hin Wong Pinnacle
Midday: Final beach time at Sairee Beach; freshly caught grilled fish lunch at a beachside shack
Afternoon: Ferry to Koh Samui Airport; departure flight to Bangkok and onward connection

title: Thailand Luxury Grand Tour
description: Thailand's luxury scene is world-class, from Bangkok's iconic Mandarin Oriental to private pool villas in Phuket. This grand tour covers the glittering capital, the gilded temples of Chiang Mai, and the turquoise waters of the Andaman Sea – all experienced with private guides, premium accommodation, and flawless service. The best of Thailand, elevated.
inclusions: 6 nights in 5-star hotels and private pool villa resorts
All breakfasts, 3 gourmet lunches, and 5 fine dining dinners with wine pairing
Private air-conditioned car and expert guide throughout all city tours
James Bond Island and Phang Nga Bay private longtail charter (full day)
Domestic flights Bangkok–Chiang Mai–Phuket in business class
exclusions: Personal spa treatments beyond what's included; premium alcohol beyond wine pairing

days.title: Arrival in Bangkok – Oriental Grandeur
days.image: Bangkok Mandarin Oriental Hotel riverside elegance sunset terrace
activities: VIP arrival and private transfer to Mandarin Oriental Bangkok (or equivalent iconic luxury property)
Afternoon: Private boat tour along the Chao Phraya – visit Wat Arun and old Thonburi canal community
Evening: Welcome dinner at the hotel's Authors' Lounge followed by sunset cocktails on the riverside terrace

days.title: Bangkok – Grand Palace & Fine Dining
days.image: Bangkok Grand Palace detail golden mosaic spires Emerald Buddha evening
activities: Morning: Private skip-the-queue tour of the Grand Palace and Wat Phra Kaew with a royal historian
Midday: Gourmet Thai lunch at Nahm restaurant (award-winning Thai cuisine)
Afternoon: Explore Jim Thompson House and the silk district; evening Chao Phraya dinner cruise on a converted rice barge

days.title: Business Class to Chiang Mai – Lanna Kingdom
days.image: Chiang Mai Doi Suthep temple golden chedi valley view evening mist
activities: Business class flight Bangkok to Chiang Mai; private transfer to a luxury boutique resort
Afternoon: Private guided tour of Doi Suthep Pagoda – golden chedi with panoramic valley views; visit Wat Chedi Luang in the Old City
Evening: Dinner at a Lanna-style restaurant with live traditional music and Thai classical dance

days.title: Chiang Mai – Elephant Sanctuary VIP & Cooking Masterclass
days.image: Chiang Mai elephant sanctuary private forest bathing muddy happy elephant
activities: Morning: Private VIP visit to an ethical elephant sanctuary – personal interaction with a small group of rescued elephants
Midday: Farm-to-table gourmet lunch at a Chiang Mai organic restaurant
Afternoon: Thai culinary masterclass with a renowned Chiang Mai chef; prepare and dine on a 5-dish menu

days.title: Business Class to Phuket – Private Pool Villa
days.image: Phuket private pool villa infinity pool Andaman Sea sunset luxury
activities: Morning: Leisurely breakfast; business class flight Chiang Mai to Phuket
Afternoon: Private transfer to an oceanfront pool villa resort at Kata Noi or Surin Beach
Evening: Sunset cocktails at a clifftop bar; dinner at a beachfront restaurant with fresh Andaman catch

days.title: Phang Nga Bay – James Bond Island Private Charter
days.image: Phang Nga Bay James Bond Island Ko Tapu limestone needle sea kayak morning
activities: 8 AM: Board a private longtail or speedboat charter to Phang Nga Bay National Park
Full day: Visit Ko Tapu (James Bond Island), kayak through sea caves and mangroves; private lunch on a secluded beach
Evening: Sunset drinks at the villa pool; farewell fine dining dinner with a private chef

days.title: Phuket – Big Buddha & Departure
days.image: Phuket Big Buddha white marble hilltop ocean panorama morning clear sky
activities: Morning: Visit the Phuket Big Buddha – 45-metre white marble statue with 360° ocean views
Midday: Last swim at Kata Beach or spa morning at the resort
Afternoon: Private transfer to Phuket International Airport for departure flight

title: Thailand Cultural Heritage Journey
description: Look beyond Thailand's beaches and discover its extraordinary cultural heritage. This itinerary explores the ruined kingdom of Ayutthaya, Bangkok's most sacred temples, and the ancient Lanna culture of Chiang Mai. With local guides bringing centuries of history to life, this is Thailand for curious minds and heritage lovers.
inclusions: 4 nights in culturally situated heritage hotels (Old City area in Chiang Mai; near temples in Bangkok)
Daily breakfast and 2 traditional cultural lunches (Ayutthaya and Chiang Mai)
Ayutthaya full-day UNESCO heritage site tour by bicycle with guide
Bangkok Wat Pho traditional Thai massage (90-minute school session)
Private air-conditioned transfers; Chiang Mai–Bangkok domestic flight
exclusions: Personal expenses, tips for guides, and dinners not specified

days.title: Arrival in Bangkok – Sacred Temples
days.image: Bangkok Wat Pho complex Buddha statues monks orange robes courtyard
activities: Arrive at Suvarnabhumi Airport; private transfer to a hotel near the Grand Palace
Afternoon: Visit Wat Pho (Reclining Buddha complex and traditional massage school); walk to Wat Mahathat
Evening: Join a guided almsgiving experience in the old town; dinner at a traditional Thai restaurant near the river

days.title: Ayutthaya – Ancient Capital Day Tour
days.image: Ayutthaya Wat Mahathat Buddha head in tree roots ancient stone ruins
activities: 7 AM: Bus to Ayutthaya (1.5 hours); rent bicycles to explore the UNESCO World Heritage ruins
Full day: Visit Wat Mahathat (famous Buddha head in tree roots), Wat Ratchaburana, Wat Chaiwatthanaram along the river
Evening: Return to Bangkok; visit Bangkok's famous Chinatown (Yaowarat Road) for street food

days.title: Bangkok – Spiritual Bangkok & Markets
days.image: Bangkok Grand Palace Emerald Buddha interior gold mosaic mural sacred
activities: Morning: Grand Palace and Wat Phra Kaew (Temple of the Emerald Buddha) with a cultural guide
Afternoon: Visit Wat Saket (Golden Mount) and Wat Ratchanatdaram (Loha Prasat); walk through Pak Khlong Talat flower market
Evening: Dinner cruise on the Chao Phraya River; optional visit to the National Museum of Thailand

days.title: Fly to Chiang Mai – Lanna Culture
days.image: Chiang Mai Wat Chedi Luang ancient ruined chedi old city moat evening
activities: Morning flight to Chiang Mai; private transfer to an Old City heritage hotel within the moat
Afternoon: Walking tour of the Old City – Wat Chedi Luang, Wat Phra Singh, and Wat Chiang Man (oldest temple in Chiang Mai)
Evening: Yi Peng paper lantern experience (if in season) or the Saturday Walking Street night market

days.title: Chiang Mai – Hill Tribes & Departure
days.image: Chiang Mai hill tribe village Akha woman traditional costume colourful
activities: Morning: Visit Doi Suthep Temple; tour the Chiang Mai City Arts and Cultural Centre inside the old governor's residence
Midday: Excursion to a hill tribe village near Mae Rim to learn about Akha and Karen communities
Afternoon: Browse Warorot Market for silk and local products; transfer to Chiang Mai Airport for departure

title: Bangkok & Phuket Weekend Sprint
description: The ultimate long-weekend trip to Thailand combining Bangkok's world-class street food scene and iconic temples with the white sand beaches and turquoise waters of Phuket. Fly in Friday, be on a beach by Saturday, and return Sunday night feeling completely recharged. A compact but deeply satisfying Thai escape.
inclusions: 3 nights accommodation (1 night Bangkok boutique hotel + 2 nights Phuket beachfront resort)
Daily breakfast and welcome Thai dinner in Bangkok
Bangkok Grand Palace and Wat Pho guided half-day tour
Phuket Phi Phi Island shared speedboat day trip with snorkelling
Private airport and hotel transfers throughout
exclusions: Personal expenses, tips, and optional excursions

days.title: Arrival in Bangkok – Street Food & Temples
days.image: Bangkok Wat Arun temple riverside golden hour twilight reflection
activities: Arrive at Bangkok; transfer to hotel in the Old Town area near the temples
Afternoon: Guided half-day tour of Wat Pho and Wat Arun; cross the Chao Phraya by river ferry
Evening: Street food walking tour in Chinatown – dumplings, grilled oysters, mango sticky rice, and fresh fruit juices

days.title: Bangkok to Phuket – Beach Time
days.image: Phuket Kata Beach calm blue water boats white sand afternoon sun
activities: Morning: Quick visit to the Grand Palace (early start to beat crowds); transfer to Suvarnabhumi Airport
Midday flight Bangkok to Phuket; check in to a beachfront hotel at Kata or Karon Beach
Afternoon: Beach time, cocktails, and a Thai massage on the beach; evening at Bangla Road night market

days.title: Phi Phi Islands Day Trip
days.image: Phi Phi Island Maya Bay clear green water limestone cliffs speedboat group
activities: 8 AM: Shared speedboat to Phi Phi Islands – visit Maya Bay, snorkel at Shark Point, and explore Phi Phi Don village
Midday: Beachside Thai lunch on Phi Phi Don Island
Afternoon: Return to Phuket; sunset at Promthep Cape (southernmost point of Phuket); farewell seafood dinner at the beach

days.title: Phuket – Big Buddha & Departure
days.image: Phuket Big Buddha hilltop white marble statue sunrise golden morning
activities: Morning: Visit Phuket Big Buddha and Wat Chalong – Phuket's most important Buddhist temple
Late morning: Final swim at Surin Beach or Kamala Beach
Afternoon: Transfer to Phuket International Airport for departure flight back home
